name: Iron Diva
description:
Majestic, futuristic, out of this world! Meet the Iron Diva!

A fanmade paradox Pokemon from the Metapod para Presidente Discord server, credits to the user Mr. Chaotic.

I just tried to make a story with this design because I liked it so much.

Aside from that, Happy New Year!!!
